title: cedrus libani subsp. deodora
intro: Cedrus libani subsp. deodora, commonly known as Deodar cedar, is a subspecies of the Atlas cedar (Cedrus libani) native to the Himalayan foothills. This evergreen coniferous tree is valued for its fragrant wood and medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Deodar cedar include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Deodar cedar can be prepared as an herbal tea, essential oil, or incense, which can be used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
